app.title: VANESSA
app.subtitle: Mission console for semantic search and automation

default.title: Core themes
default.description: The standard VANESSA presentation with familiar day and night presets.

retro.title: Retro terminal
retro.description: A terminal-inspired family with phosphor color cues and restrained vintage chrome.

defaultDay.title: Day
defaultDay.description: Bright, clean workspace tuned for daytime reading.

defaultNight.title: Night
defaultNight.description: Low-light workspace with cooler contrast and softer glare.

retroTerminal.title: Retro terminal
retroTerminal.description: VT-era terminal character with readable spacing, practical controls, and balanced glow.

architecture.title: Architecture Diagram
architecture.unavailable: Architecture diagram is unavailable in this backend environment.

error.legacyFallback: This backend version does not expose full system health yet. Showing available checks only.
error.architectureUnavailable: Architecture artifacts could not be loaded.

error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a local account
register.pendingNote: New accounts require approval by an admin or superadmin before login.
register.successPending: Account created. It is pending activation.

approvals.title: Pending user approvals
approvals.subtitle: Activate pending users by ID.
approvals.subtitleWithList: Review and process pending users below.
approvals.note: Listing pending users is not available yet in this backend version.
approvals.invalidId: Provide a valid numeric user ID.

user.title: Welcome, user
user.subtitle: You can manage your own assistant workspace.

items.item1: View and edit your profile details.

admin.title: Welcome, admin
admin.subtitle: You can moderate users and monitor operations.

items.item3: Review system usage for your team.

superadmin.title: Welcome, superadmin
superadmin.subtitle: You have full platform governance controls.

items.item1: Access all admin approvals and workflows.

guest.title: Welcome to VANESSA
guest.description: Sign in or create an account to start using your AI mission console.

authenticated.title: Welcome back
authenticated.description: You are signed in as {{username}}. Open your control panel, AI Playground, or Vanessa AI workspace.

control.title: Control panel for {{username}}
control.description: Use your role-based control surface to manage account tools, approvals, models, and operations.

models.title: Models Management
models.description: Manage model credentials, registered models, and allowed capabilities.

ai.title: Vanessa AI
ai.description: Open Vanessa-specific assistant experiences and future first-party capabilities.

playgrounds.title: AI Playground
playgrounds.description: Open generic chat and knowledge workspaces for model and retrieval exploration.

agentBuilder.title: Agent builder
agentBuilder.description: Author reusable agent projects, validate their runtime constraints, and prepare them for publishing.

approvals.title: User approvals
approvals.description: Review and activate pending user accounts.

quotes.title: Quote management
quotes.description: Search, review, edit, and add quote-of-the-day entries.

systemHealth.title: System health
systemHealth.description: Inspect the live status of VANESSA services and architecture.

platform.title: Platform control
platform.description: Review the active GenAI topology and jump into provider or deployment management from a focused control-plane home.

context.title: Context management
context.description: Create and manage reusable knowledge bases and the documents they expose for retrieval.

catalog.title: Agent and tool catalog
catalog.description: Create, publish, and validate managed agent and tool definitions.

ai.title: Vanessa AI
ai.description: Access Vanessa-specific assistant experiences as the first-party Vanessa surface evolves toward memory, personality, and deeper personalization.

vanessa.title: Vanessa Core
vanessa.description: Work with Vanessa as a first-party assistant inside the Vanessa AI workspace.

playgrounds.title: AI Playground
playgrounds.description: Use shared chat and knowledge-grounded workspaces to explore models and bound knowledge bases without entering Vanessa-specific assistant flows.

chat.title: Chat Workspace
chat.description: Start or continue a model-backed conversation in the shared playground workspace.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Chat
knowledge.description: Ask questions against deployment-bound knowledge bases and review cited source snippets.

knowledgeChat.title: Knowledge Chat
knowledgeChat.description: Search the shared knowledge corpus while keeping a separate citation-backed conversation history.

fields.placeholder: Ask a question about the shared knowledge base

states.empty: No messages yet. Ask a question to retrieve knowledge-backed context.
states.noKnowledgeBases: No managed knowledge bases are bound to the active deployment.
states.knowledgeBaseUnavailable: The selected knowledge base is no longer available in the active deployment.
states.knowledgeBaseRequired: Select a knowledge base before starting knowledge chat.

rename.title: Rename conversation
rename.description: Choose a clearer title for this saved conversation.

delete.title: Delete conversation
delete.description: Delete "{{title}}"? This removes the saved conversation history from the sidebar.

contextManagement.title: Context management
contextManagement.description: Manage reusable knowledge bases and curate the documents they expose through retrieval.
contextManagement.createDescription: Create a managed knowledge base and choose which vector-store provider instance will back it.
contextManagement.detailDescription: Review metadata, deployment usage, and documents for this managed knowledge base.
contextManagement.queryDescription: Run a retrieval query through the active deployment runtime before binding this knowledge base into product flows.
contextManagement.sourcesDescription: Manage repeatable content sources that reconcile documents into this knowledge base.

sourceViews.addDescription: Create a repeatable content source or continue editing the currently selected source.
sourceViews.editDescription: Update the selected content source and save the new sync settings for this knowledge base.
sourceViews.listDescription: Review the sources already configured for this knowledge base and run per-source actions.

contextManagement.uploadDescription: Create or edit manual documents and upload supported files into this knowledge base.
contextManagement.documentsBrowserDescription: Review the documents currently stored in this knowledge base and open full text in a separate window.
contextManagement.documentViewDescription: Read the full text and source details for this knowledge-base document.
contextManagement.manualDocumentsDescription: Manage manually curated documents separately from source-managed content.
contextManagement.syncHistoryDescription: Review the recent source sync attempts and what changed in each run.

advancedSettings.title: Advanced settings
advancedSettings.description: Choose how this knowledge base will get vectors before you start ingesting documents.
advancedSettings.chunkingDescription: Fixed-length chunking uses strict token windows with overlap so neighboring chunks share context.
advancedSettings.chunkLimitHint: Selected embeddings model supports up to {{safeChunkLengthMax}} chunk tokens safely ({{maxInputTokens}} total tokens minus {{specialTokensPerInput}} special tokens).
advancedSettings.embeddingProviderNotReady: {{provider}} is available, but it is not advertising any embeddings models yet. Assign a loaded embeddings model in Platform Control before using it for this knowledge base.
advancedSettings.namedVectorsNote: Weaviate can support named vectors later, but this first slice uses a single default vector space per knowledge base.
advancedSettings.selfProvidedWarning: Self-provided vectors are stored in the vector database, but the current text ingestion and text-query retrieval flows are not available for this knowledge base yet.

states.noSchemaProfiles: No reusable schema profiles are available for this provider yet. You can still define one below.
states.customSchemaDraft: You are editing a custom schema derived from the selected profile.
states.weaviateSystemFields: Weaviate automatically adds system fields such as document_id, text, and metadata_json. Do not duplicate them in the custom schema.
states.empty: No knowledge bases have been created yet.
states.noDocuments: No documents have been added yet.
states.noManualDocuments: No manual documents are available yet.
states.noSources: No managed sources have been configured yet.
states.noSyncRuns: No source syncs have been recorded yet.
states.ineligible: Not currently eligible for deployment binding.
states.chunkingEditableBeforeIngest: Chunking can still be edited because this knowledge base has not ingested any documents yet.
states.chunkingLockedAfterIngest: Chunking is locked after documents have been ingested.
states.sourceRelativePathHelp: Relative paths must stay under an allowlisted context source root. In local staging, that maps to the host-side context_sources/ directory.
states.documentManagedReadOnly: This document is source-managed and can only be changed through its source sync.
states.readOnlyUpload: You can browse documents here, but only superadmins can create, edit, upload, or delete them.
states.documentNotFound: The requested document could not be found in this knowledge base.
states.syncRunSummary: Scanned {{scanned}} file(s), changed {{changed}}, deleted files {{deletedFiles}}, created documents {{createdDocs}}, updated documents {{updatedDocs}}, deleted documents {{deletedDocs}}.
states.noQueryResults: No retrieval results matched this query.

feedback.loadFailed: Unable to load context management data.
feedback.schemaProfilesLoadFailed: Unable to load reusable schema profiles.
feedback.providerRequired: Select a vector-store provider before creating the knowledge base.
feedback.embeddingProviderRequired: Select an embeddings provider before creating the knowledge base.
feedback.embeddingResourceRequired: Select an embeddings model before creating the knowledge base.
feedback.chunkingStrategyRequired: Select a chunking strategy before creating the knowledge base.
feedback.chunkLengthInvalid: Chunk length must be a positive integer.
feedback.chunkLengthExceedsModelLimit: Chunk length {{chunkLength}} exceeds the selected embeddings model safe maximum of {{safeChunkLengthMax}} tokens.
feedback.chunkOverlapInvalid: Chunk overlap must be a non-negative integer.
feedback.chunkOverlapTooLarge: Chunk overlap must be smaller than chunk length.
feedback.schemaProfileRequired: Select a schema profile or switch to Raw JSON before creating the knowledge base.
feedback.invalidSchema: Schema JSON must be valid JSON.
feedback.schemaProfileDisplayNameRequired: Schema profile display name is required.
feedback.schemaProfileCreateFailed: Unable to save the reusable schema profile.
feedback.resyncFailed: Unable to resync the knowledge base.
feedback.queryFailed: Unable to run the retrieval test.

schema.description: Choose a provider-specific schema profile, refine its properties, or switch to raw JSON for advanced editing.

sourceBrowser.title: Browse source directories
sourceBrowser.description: Click a directory to select it and open it. Use current directory when you are ready to confirm and close.
sourceBrowser.empty: No child directories were found here.

quoteAdmin.description: Review the quote catalog, filter entries, edit records, and add new ones.

editor.selectPrompt: Select a quote from the list or create a new one.

admin.title: Admin settings

superadmin.description: Access platform-level controls and design resources.

user.title: User settings
user.description: Manage your account preferences and personal workspace access.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.description: Configure how the interface appears and behaves for your account.

theme.title: Theme personalization
theme.description: Choose a theme family and preset, then fine-tune the active preset in the style editor.
theme.selectorHelp: Pick the family and preset that should shape the interface for this browser session.

runtime.title: Runtime profile
runtime.description: Controls the platform-wide runtime mode used for safety gates and tool access.
runtime.restrictionMessage: Only superadmins can change the runtime profile.
runtime.lockedMessage: This runtime profile is locked by environment configuration.

navigation.title: Settings navigation
navigation.description: Use canonical settings and control routes instead of hidden subpages.

navigation.title: Model access
navigation.description: Manage your provider credentials and register models available to your account.

credentials.title: Provider credentials
credentials.description: Register API credentials for external model providers. API keys are masked after save.

modelsHub.title: Model management
modelsHub.description: Manage your credentials, register accessible models, and review what is available to your account.
modelsHub.superadminDescription: Manage personal model access plus platform catalog, assignments, discovery, and download workflows.

models.title: Model catalog management
models.subtitle: Manage catalog entries and role-based model assignments.

catalog.title: Catalog operations
catalog.description: Add models to the platform catalog.

discovery.title: Hugging Face discovery
discovery.description: Search and inspect open models before downloading them to local storage.
discovery.empty: No models found for this query.

jobs.title: Download jobs
jobs.description: Track asynchronous download progress and failures.

assignments.title: Model assignments
assignments.description: Assign available models to each role scope.

home.title: ModelOps home
home.description: Review the models you can access, register cloud-hosted models, and move into the right workflow without operational clutter.
home.superadminDescription: Review platform-wide ModelOps health, jump into cloud or local onboarding, and manage access without keeping every operation on one page.

cards.catalogDescription: Review accessible models and open focused detail pages.
cards.cloudDescription: Add BYOK cloud models with personal or platform-aware controls.
cards.localDescription: Discover, download, and register local models.
cards.artifactsDescription: Inspect local artifacts and finish registration work.
cards.accessDescription: Assign model availability by role scope.

catalog.title: Model catalog
catalog.description: Browse the models visible to your current role and move into detail pages for lifecycle work.
catalog.empty: No models matched the current filters.

cloud.title: Cloud model registration
cloud.description: Register cloud-hosted models with personal credentials and account-scoped visibility.
cloud.superadminDescription: Register cloud-hosted models with personal or platform credentials, then validate and activate them from focused detail pages.
cloud.emptyRecent: No cloud models have been registered yet.

local.title: Local model registration
local.description: Onboard local models through Hugging Face discovery, downloads, or manual artifact registration.
local.noArtifacts: No local artifacts are available yet.

artifacts.title: Local artifacts
artifacts.description: Review local artifacts, check readiness, and register artifacts that are ready to move into the catalog lifecycle.

access.title: Model access management
access.description: Assign role-scope access to models without mixing those controls into registration pages.

detail.title: Model detail
detail.noValidations: No validations have been recorded yet.
detail.noUsageMetrics: No usage metrics are available yet.

testing.title: Model test
testing.noTests: No tests have been recorded yet.
testing.noResult: Run a model test to see the latest result summary.
testing.validationReady: A successful test run is available. Confirm validation when you are ready.
testing.validationBlocked: Validation stays disabled until a successful test run is recorded.
testing.validationAlreadyCurrent: This model is already validated for its current configuration.
testing.runtimeDescription: Superadmins can choose a compatible runtime for exact local-model testing without changing the active platform deployment.
testing.runtimeMismatch: The selected runtime does not currently serve this local model.
testing.runtimeLoadFailed: Unable to load compatible runtimes for this local model.
testing.noCompatibleRuntime: No compatible runtime currently serves this local model.
testing.runtimeSlotEmpty: This runtime slot is currently empty.
testing.embeddingsRuntimeGuidance: Exact local embeddings testing only works when an embeddings runtime already serves this model.
testing.embeddingsRuntimeConfigHint: Assign {{target}} to the local embeddings provider slot in Platform Control so the runtime controller loads it.
testing.unsupportedDescription: Testing is not yet supported for this model type or runtime combination.

platformControl.title: Platform control
platformControl.description: Review the active platform topology, then manage providers and deployment profiles from focused operational pages.

home.description: Use the control-plane landing page to understand the active GenAI deployment, then move into providers or deployments for operational work.
home.exploreDescription: Keep the landing page as a platform overview, and use these pages for day-to-day operations.
home.providersDescription: Browse provider instances, inspect usage, and open detailed validation or configuration workflows.
home.deploymentsDescription: Review deployment profiles, activation history, and provider/model binding topology.

deployment.loadedModelNotEligibleHint: {{provider}} currently has {{model}} loaded, but deployment bindings only allow ModelOps-eligible {{capability}} models. Validate and activate this model in ModelOps before binding it.
deployment.noEligibleResourcesHint: No ModelOps-eligible {{capability}} resources are currently available for binding.

capabilities.description: Each capability reflects the active deployment binding: one active provider plus the resources or artifacts bound through that binding.
capabilities.unbound: No active provider is bound to this capability.

providers.description: Create, update, validate, and remove provider instances without editing bootstrap code.
providers.title: Platform providers
providers.pageDescription: Browse provider inventory, see where each provider is used, and open focused operational detail pages.
providers.newDescription: Create a provider instance from a supported provider family and then continue validation and usage review from its detail page.
providers.detailDescription: Inspect one provider, review its deployment usage, validate reachability, and update its configuration.
providers.validationDescription: Run live validation checks against this provider and the current binding context.
providers.inactiveReference: Not used by the active deployment
providers.loadedModelDescription: Assign a local managed model to this provider slot and the runtime controller will load it so the provider can advertise it.
providers.loadedModelStateHintEmpty: No local managed model is currently assigned to this provider slot.
providers.loadedModelStateHintLoading: The runtime controller is currently loading the assigned local model.
providers.loadedModelStateHintReconciling: The runtime controller is refreshing runtime inventory for the assigned local model.
providers.loadedModelStateHintLoaded: The assigned local model is loaded and ready to be advertised by this provider.
providers.loadedModelHelp: Assigning a model now stores slot intent and triggers the matching local runtime to load it. The page will refresh while the runtime reports loading progress.
providers.loadPanelSummaryLoading: Request accepted. Waiting for the runtime to load {{name}}.
providers.loadPanelSummaryReconciling: The runtime is reconciling {{name}} and refreshing its advertised inventory.
providers.loadPanelSummaryLoaded: The runtime finished loading {{name}} and reported it as ready.
providers.loadPanelSummaryError: The runtime could not finish loading {{name}}.
providers.settingsDescription: Update provider metadata, endpoint settings, enabled state, config, and secret refs.
providers.usageDescription: Bound resources belong to deployment bindings, so usage is grouped by deployment profile.
providers.noUsage: This provider is not referenced by any deployment profile.
providers.deleteDescription: Delete this provider only when it is no longer referenced by deployment profiles.
providers.notFound: The requested provider could not be found.

bindingErrors.resource_required: Select bound resources in a deployment binding before validating this provider.
bindingErrors.resource_not_exposed: Resource {{resourceId}} is not exposed by the provider as {{providerResourceId}}.

providers.createHelp: Create a new provider instance or edit an existing one.

deployments.description: Create, edit, clone, activate, and delete deployment profiles from the active provider inventory.
deployments.title: Deployment profiles
deployments.pageDescription: Review deployment inventory, activation history, and the active binding topology across platform capabilities.
deployments.newDescription: Create a deployment profile by selecting one provider binding per required capability and assigning resources where needed.
deployments.detailDescription: Inspect one deployment profile, update its bindings, clone it, and activate it when ready.
deployments.directoryDescription: {{count}} deployment profiles match the current filters.
deployments.confirmActivation: Confirm activation for this deployment profile.
deployments.createHelp: Define the provider bindings for a deployment profile.
deployments.cloneDescription: Create a new deployment profile by copying this deployment's current topology and metadata.
deployments.settingsDescription: Update deployment details first, then adjust one provider binding row for each required capability.
deployments.deleteDescription: Delete this deployment profile only when it is no longer the active deployment.
deployments.recentActivationsDescription: Review when this deployment profile was promoted and what it replaced.
deployments.notFound: The requested deployment profile could not be found.

audit.description: Review deployment switches and who triggered them.
audit.empty: No deployment activations have been recorded yet.

feedback.authRequired: Authentication is required to load platform control data.
feedback.loadFailed: Unable to load platform control data.
feedback.invalidJson: {{field}} must be valid JSON object text.
feedback.bindingRequired: All required capability providers must be selected.
feedback.capabilityProviderRequired: {{capability}} requires a selected provider before it can be saved.
feedback.resourceRequired: {{capability}} requires at least one bound resource.
feedback.providerLoadedModelAssigned: Assigned a loaded model to {{name}} and started runtime loading.
feedback.providerLoadedModelAssignFailed: Unable to assign the loaded model.
feedback.providerLoadedModelClearFailed: Unable to clear the loaded model.

agents.description: Define agent instructions, model defaults, and tool bindings before publishing.

tools.description: Define tool transport, schemas, and safety policy, then validate active runtime compatibility.

feedback.authRequired: Authentication is required to manage the catalog.
feedback.validationFailed: Unable to validate this catalog entry.

agentBuilder.description: Author builder-facing agent projects without coupling the workspace to raw catalog or registry forms.
agentBuilder.detailDescription: Edit this project, validate its runtime constraints, and publish it into the runtime catalog when ready.
agentBuilder.projectsDescription: Review and continue your saved agent projects.
agentBuilder.previewDescription: This internal preview contract is ready for future playground and Vanessa-core integrations.

runtimeMode.permissionDenied: Only superadmins can change runtime mode.
runtimeMode.lockedByEnvironment: Runtime mode is locked by environment configuration at {{mode}}.
runtimeMode.confirmEnableOffline: Switch to Offline mode for all users? Internet-dependent actions will be blocked system-wide.
